title: Withered Bones
description: This texture pack changes the bones and its derivatives (bone meal and bone block)
body:
**"Just Wither Bones" is a small texture pack that changes bones, bone meal, and bone blocks to a withered version.**

### Versions Available:

This should work in basically every version, there is only going to be the "wrong version" message.

If you find a problem with a specific version please report it so I can downgrade the texture pack to that version!

### Do you like this texture pack? Try also my other ones!

Just Wither Bones [(Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/withered-bones) [(Curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/just-wither-bones)


Nylium Menu [(Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nylium-menu) [(Curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/nylium-menu)
